transcript: I have a dull pain behind my left collarbone when coughing. I have asthma and have had a virus for a couple of weeks. I have been coughing quite a bit, and it seems to be not very productive. The pain usually comes after a breathing treatment. Is it a pulled muscle or something worse?
transcript_normalized: i have a dull pain behind my left collarbone when coughing i have asthma and have had a virus for a couple of weeks i have been coughing quite a bit and it seems to be not very productive the pain usually comes after a breathing treatment is it a pulled muscle or something worse

transcript: Excessive use of accessory muscles of respiration during coughing leads to pain in the collarbones, as a few accessory muscles are inserted in the clavicle bone.
transcript_normalized: excessive use of accessory muscles of respiration during coughing leads to pain in the collarbones as a few accessory muscles are inserted in the clavicle bone

transcript: I am having asthma attacks and experiencing pins and needle sensations in my chest, arms, and hands. My family has also been ill with chest congestion, and we have all been coughing a lot. I have had two heart stents placed in the last eleven months. Should I just try to stay comfortable and endure the horrible sensations when coughing, or should I be seen? I haven’t had asthma attacks in a few years either. Never mind, I was hoping you could help; I didn’t realize there was a fee.
transcript_normalized: i am having asthma attacks and experiencing pins and needle sensations in my chest arms and hands my family has also been ill with chest congestion and we have all been coughing a lot i have had two heart stents placed in the last eleven months should i just try to stay comfortable and endure the horrible sensations when coughing or should i be seen i haven’t had asthma attacks in a few years either never mind i was hoping you could help i didn’t realize there was a fee

transcript: Not a concern. Some nerves might get disturbed during the insertion of stents, which can cause such sensations. There is no need to panic.
transcript_normalized: not a concern some nerves might get disturbed during the insertion of stents which can cause such sensations there is no need to panic

transcript: My husband is having pain in his lower back. If he lies on the floor with no pillows, he cannot lift his legs up. In the mornings, he cannot put his pants or socks on. He has problems transitioning from sitting to standing, but if he waits a few seconds, he is fine. Tonight, as always, he went to the gym and jumped rope, ran, and lifted weights with minimal pain. He has no problem twisting or lifting. Mostly when his back is straight up and down or lying straight, he feels the pain. This pain is not constant, but when it hurts, it hurts. What can we do for help?
transcript_normalized: my husband is having pain in his lower back if he lies on the floor with no pillows he cannot lift his legs up in the mornings he cannot put his pants or socks on he has problems transitioning from sitting to standing but if he waits a few seconds he is fine tonight as always he went to the gym and jumped rope ran and lifted weights with minimal pain he has no problem twisting or lifting mostly when his back is straight up and down or lying straight he feels the pain this pain is not constant but when it hurts it hurts what can we do for help

transcript: Possibly, it is some muscular or myofascial pain arising in some particular area. He should do warm-up exercises for his back before getting up in the morning and before going to the gym. Some massage and hot fomentation should precede that. However, he should avoid lifting weights and lifting anything in a bent position. He should squat and then lift objects from the ground.
transcript_normalized: possibly it is some muscular or myofascial pain arising in some particular area he should do warm up exercises for his back before getting up in the morning and before going to the gym some massage and hot fomentation should precede that however he should avoid lifting weights and lifting anything in a bent position he should squat and then lift objects from the ground

transcript: My daughter just called me. She lives in another state and is waiting for medical papers for coverage from her father to be able to see a doctor. In the meantime, she called and mentioned that the skin over her spinal column is bruised, and she hasn't hurt herself or bumped into anything. She does, on occasion, have back pain, and there are no bruises anywhere else on her body. She is extremely upset and concerned about what could cause it.
transcript_normalized: my daughter just called me she lives in another state and is waiting for medical papers for coverage from her father to be able to see a doctor in the meantime she called and mentioned that the skin over her spinal column is bruised and she hasn t hurt herself or bumped into anything she does on occasion have back pain and there are no bruises anywhere else on her body she is extremely upset and concerned about what could cause it

transcript: Hi, I did review your concern. Your daughter needs medical attention and she needs to be completely evaluated. A complete blood count, platelet count, and a coagulation profile are necessary. Also, a doctor needs to examine her back for any other abnormalities and also how the bruise looks. Some skin lesions can resemble bruises but are not formed as a result of blood extravasation in tissues. Therefore, a complete skin lesion analysis by a dermatologist will also be beneficial. I hope this helps. I wish you and your daughter a healthy life ahead.
transcript_normalized: hi i did review your concern your daughter needs medical attention and she needs to be completely evaluated a complete blood count platelet count and a coagulation profile are necessary also a doctor needs to examine her back for any other abnormalities and also how the bruise looks some skin lesions can resemble bruises but are not formed as a result of blood extravasation in tissues therefore a complete skin lesion analysis by a dermatologist will also be beneficial i hope this helps i wish you and your daughter a healthy life ahead

transcript: Hello Doctor, I am a male, twenty-seven years old, weighing ninety-eight kilograms, and my height is five feet ten inches. I have been training in the gym for the past three months, but my weight loss has been barely three kilograms. Should I go for any thyroid tests? Also, I feel like I sweat very little compared to some earlier years of my life. My mother was a patient of hyperthyroidism, so what are the chances of me suffering from hypothyroidism? I also suffer from kidney stones.
transcript_normalized: hello doctor i am a male twenty seven years old weighing ninety eight kilograms and my height is five feet ten inches i have been training in the gym for the past three months but my weight loss has been barely three kilograms should i go for any thyroid tests also i feel like i sweat very little compared to some earlier years of my life my mother was a patient of hyperthyroidism so what are the chances of me suffering from hypothyroidism i also suffer from kidney stones

transcript: If you have symptoms like constipation, cold intolerance, weight gain even with poor intake of food, and loss of appetite, you may be suffering from hypothyroidism. A thyroid function test should confirm the presence or absence of the problem. Kidney stones are mostly not related to hypothyroidism.
transcript_normalized: if you have symptoms like constipation cold intolerance weight gain even with poor intake of food and loss of appetite you may be suffering from hypothyroidism a thyroid function test should confirm the presence or absence of the problem kidney stones are mostly not related to hypothyroidism

transcript: كلمني!
.هذه نكتة
هل معك ولاعة ؟
هل كتبت الواجب بنفسك ؟
.وجدنا الباب الرئيسي مقفل
أتحس بوجع في بطنك ؟
هل أنت سعيد ؟
.يتحدث بسرعة كبيرة
كنت أحب السباحة.
الأبطال دائماً يصلون متأخرين.

يا أبو خالد، نتائج التحاليل بينت إن السكر التراكمي مرتفع والكوليسترول بعد فوق المعدل الطبيعي. بنستمر على Metformin مرتين باليوم، وبنضيف Jardiance حبة يوميًا. أما الدهون فابدأ على Atorvastatin قبل النوم. إذا حسيت بعطش شديد أو كثرة التبول أو دوخة، راجعنا فورًا. وأبغاك تلتزم بالحمية وتتابع قياس السكر بشكل يومي.

يا أم محمد، الأشعة أوضحت وجود التهاب بسيط في الرئة. بصرف لك Augmentin لمدة سبعة أيام، ومعاه Paracetamol للحرارة إذا احتجتي. إذا استمر الكحة أو صار عندك ضيق نفس، استخدمي البخاخ Ventolin وتعالي للمراجعة مباشرة.

يا أبو راشد، الضغط عندك ما زال مرتفع رغم العلاج الحالي. بنرفع جرعة Amlodipine ونضيف Losartan مرة يوميًا. إذا حسيت بصداع شديد أو زغللة في النظر أو ألم بالصدر، توجه للطوارئ فورًا. حاول تقلل الملح وتمارس المشي يوميًا.

يا أختي، الأعراض اللي تشتكين منها تتوافق مع ارتجاع بالمريء. خذي Omeprazole قبل الفطور يوميًا لمدة شهر، واستخدمي Gaviscon بعد الوجبات عند الحاجة. تجنبي الأكل الدسم والقهوة قبل النوم، وإذا استمرت الأعراض بنسوي منظار للمعدة.
يا أبو عبدالله، واضح إن عندك نوبة ربو تحسسي. استخدم بخاخ Symbicort بشكل منتظم صباحًا ومساءً، وخلك محتفظ ببخاخ Ventolin للطوارئ. إذا زادت الأعراض أو صار عندك صفير شديد بالتنفس، راجع المستشفى مباشرة.

يا أم فهد، تحليل البول أكد وجود التهاب بالمسالك البولية. باعطيك Ciprofloxacin لمدة خمسة أيام، ومعاه Paracetamol إذا كان فيه ألم أو حرارة. أكثري من شرب الماء، وإذا صار فيه ألم بالخاصرة أو ارتفاع شديد بالحرارة لازم تراجعين بسرعة.
يا أختي، نتائج الغدة تبين إن عندك قصور بالغدة الدرقية. بنبدأ علاج Levothyroxine كل صباح على معدة فاضية. بعد ستة أسابيع بنعيد تحليل TSH ونشوف إذا الجرعة مناسبة أو تحتاج تعديل.

يا أبو ناصر، بعد مراجعة الفحوصات بنستمر على Aspirin وClopidogrel لتقليل خطر الجلطات، ومعهم Bisoprolol لتنظيم نبضات القلب وRosuvastatin للكوليسترول. مهم جدًا الالتزام بالأدوية وعدم إيقاف أي دواء بدون استشارة.

يا أم خالد، عندك التهاب بالجيوب الأنفية مصحوب باحتقان شديد. باصرف لك Augmentin لمدة أسبوع وCetirizine للحساسية وFluticasone Nasal Spray للاحتقان. إذا استمرت الأعراض أكثر من عشرة أيام لازم نعيد التقييم.

يا أبو سالم، الأعراض والتحاليل تشير إلى التهاب بالمفاصل. بنبدأ على Methotrexate أسبوعيًا مع Folic Acid، وخذ Ibuprofen عند اللزوم للألم. ضروري تسوي تحاليل وظائف الكبد بشكل دوري أثناء العلاج، وإذا حسيت بأي أعراض غير معتادة تواصل معنا فورًا.
